title: phylacium majus
intro: Phylacium majus, also known as the Pygeum tree, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The bark and leaves of the Phylacium majus plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phylacium majus include its ability to support prostate health, reduce the risk of urinary tract infections, and alleviate symptoms of benign prostatic hyperplasia. Phylacium majus can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, as well as a tea or tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
